articles.title: PE IS NO LONGER COMING TO THE RESCUE
articles.summary: $587B in tech M&A flowed in 2025 - the highest in a decade. However, strip out five megadeals and average deal sizes actually dropped 17%. The tech bond distressed ratio hit 9.5%, the highest since Q4 2023. If you're building a solid-but-not-spectacular SaaS company, the PE escape hatch is closed. You can't build to $20M ARR and assume someone will buy you anymore. Growth is currency again - and "efficient growth" no longer substitutes for actual growth.

articles.title: WHY IQ AND EQ AREN'T ENOUGH ANYMORE. THE AGE OF AI DEMANDS AQ.
articles.summary: The rise of AI demands a focus on Agency Quotient (AQ), the ability to actualize and execute effectively, which surpasses traditional metrics like IQ and EQ. High AQ individuals transform intentions into reality, essential in an AI-driven world where passive reliance on technology risks overshadowing human initiative. As AI democratizes intelligence, those who direct and build, rather than simply consume, will thrive, making AQ a critical skill for future productivity and innovation.

articles.title: THE OPENING, MIDGAME, AND ENDGAME IN STARTUPS
articles.summary: Startups should simultaneously strategize for the opening, midgame, and endgame stages to avoid pitfalls and ensure growth. Successful founders balance initiating new ideas, achieving product-market fit, and envisioning future impact. This holistic approach enables nimble decision-making and sustained momentum, making businesses adaptable and resilient.

articles.title: THE LIGHTHOUSE PLAYBOOK
articles.summary: In environments of abundance, the strongest signal isn't what you broadcast - it's what others say about you. This playbook flips standard growth advice: instead of building your brand, find people already on your team who are respected in networks you care about and invest in building their brands. Not influencer marketing - the opposite. Linear tells the world something about you because of how it positions craft. Stripe didn't say "payment processing" - they said "increasing the GDP of the internet. AI has lowered the cost of building products toward zero, but it hasn't done anything to change the cost of attracting people to you.

articles.title: REACH OVER 6 MILLION TECH PROFESSIONALS WHERE THEY ARE PAYING ATTENTION
articles.summary: TLDR puts you in front of your target audience with almost no competition. Each newsletter features only three advertisers max, giving your message the space it deserves. Millions of developers, product managers, CEOs, and other tech decision makers actually see what you have to say! Learn more [8] about running a test campaign.

articles.title: MAJOR
articles.summary: Major allows you to vibe code internal tools with enterprise security built in.
